name: Holistics BI Platform API
what_it_does: SQL-centric business intelligence platform with REST API — enabling data teams to define reusable data models, build self-service dashboards, schedule reports, and embed analytics in products, with a code-based approach to BI using AMLP (Analytic Modeling Language for Postgres/BigQuery/Snowflake).
use_cases: Querying Holistics report data for integration with external applications via API
Managing data models and report configurations programmatically
Embedding Holistics dashboards in customer-facing products with token-based auth
Scheduling automated report exports and email distributions via API
Syncing report results with data warehouse or BI pipeline via scheduled export
not_for: Real-time streaming analytics (Holistics queries batch/warehouse data)
Ad-hoc data science and ML workflows (use Jupyter/Databricks)
Consumer-facing analytics requiring sub-second queries on raw data
best_when: A data team at a SaaS company wants a code-first, SQL-based BI tool with version control for data models, embedded analytics for customers, and self-service reporting for non-technical stakeholders.
avoid_when: You need real-time analytics, your team prefers no-code BI tools (use Metabase or Tableau), or you need enterprise on-premises deployment.

auth.notes: API key from Holistics account settings. Passed as X-HOLISTICS-KEY header. Workspace-scoped access. Embedded analytics uses separate JWT token generation. No OAuth2 or webhooks. Embedding tokens are short-lived and generated server-side.

pricing.notes: Singapore-based company. Founded 2015. AMLP (Analytic Modeling Language) for code-based data modeling. Version control for BI assets via Git. Self-service for non-technical users while data team controls models. Strong in Southeast Asian tech companies. Embedded analytics at accessible price vs Looker/Tableau.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for reports, datasets, and embedded token generation. X-HOLISTICS-KEY header auth. Moderate developer documentation. Embedded analytics via server-side JWT token with row-level security filters. Query execution via API runs against configured data sources. No webhooks — polling for async report runs.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Report reads idempotent. Dataset reads idempotent. Embedded token generation creates new tokens — idempotent by same parameters. Report execution creates new run records.
known_agent_gotchas: Embedded analytics tokens are short-lived — generate server-side on each embed request
AMLP code-based models require understanding of Holistics schema before API use
No webhooks — poll for async report run completion
Row-level security for embedded analytics configured via token filters
Data source query execution depends on underlying warehouse performance

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. Multi-region data residency (US, EU, Singapore). API key header auth. Embedded tokens with row-level security for multi-tenant isolation. Warehouse credentials stored by Holistics — evaluate trust model. Singapore company with APAC compliance focus.
